listings.title: Furnished room/NOT APARTMENT (1091 Madison St)
listings.body_md:
## Furnished room/NOT APARTMENT — 1091 Madison St

- **Rent:** $1,240 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 4-bed / 2-bath, furnished
- **Address:** 1091 Madison St, Brooklyn, NY 11221 (Bed-Stuy)
- **Coords:** 40.6907, -73.9272
- **Distance to NYU:** 5.4 miles
- **Contact:** (908) 402-0818
- **Availability:** 5/15/2026
- **Flag:** Marked "New" on the listing
- **Notes:** Same operator pattern as the other 908-area-code "Furnished room/NOT APARTMENT" cluster (Bedford, Bleecker, Franklin, Myrtle). Solid bath ratio (4 beds / 2 baths). Photos show clean furnished setup (white bedding, mounted TV).

listings.title: Chic ROOM at The Owens House
listings.body_md:
## Chic ROOM at The Owens House

- **Rent:** $1,450 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 6-bed / 2-bath, 134 sqft room
- **Address:** 529 Monroe St, Brooklyn, NY 11221
- **Coords:** 40.6856, -73.9335
- **Distance to NYU:** 4.3 miles
- **Contact:** (347) 609-4025
- **Operator:** June Homes — flexible leases
- **Availability:** Available Now
- **Notes:** Only listing in batch with explicit room sqft (134). 6 beds sharing 2 baths — flag as constraint. Outdoor patio/yard shown in photos.

listings.title: Room in Shared 4 bed/2 bath home (570 Putnam Ave)
listings.operator: June Homes (Private room in a shared home)
listings.body_md:
## Room in Shared 4 bed/2 bath home — 570 Putnam Ave

- **Rent:** $1,150 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 4-bed / 2-bath shared home
- **Address:** 570 Putnam Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11221
- **Coords:** 40.6859, -73.9367
- **Distance to NYU:** 5.6 miles

- **Operator:** June Homes — Private room in a shared home
- **Availability:** Available Now
- **Notes:** Decent bath ratio (2 baths / 4 beds). Virtual tour available. Closets shown in photos look generous.

listings.title: One or two rooms with balcony access in shared two-floor apartment
listings.body_md:
## One or two rooms with balcony access — 1178 Broadway

- **Rent:** $1,171 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 2 rooms in shared two-floor apartment, 157 sqft each, 1 bath
- **Address:** 1178 Broadway, Brooklyn, NY 11221 (Bushwick)
- **Coords:** 40.6890, -73.9210
- **Distance to NYU:** 4.2 miles
- **Contact:** (347) 720-6485 — Mon-Fri 9am-5pm; Sat-Sun 9am-5pm
- **Lease:** 4-month sublet, **5/14/26 → 8/31/26**
- **Notes:** Both rooms have balcony access; rooftop/skyline view shown in photos. Summer-only — bridge housing. 1 bath / 2 residents = good ratio. Has explicit sqft (157).

listings.title: Furnished room/NOT APARTMENT (173 Bleecker St)
listings.body_md:
## Furnished room/NOT APARTMENT — 173 Bleecker St

- **Rent:** $1,010 / bedroom — **cheapest in batch**
- **Unit:** 4-bed / 1-bath, furnished
- **Address:** 173 Bleecker St, Brooklyn, NY 11221
- **Coords:** 40.6929, -73.9215
- **Distance to NYU:** 4.6 miles
- **Contact:** (908) 460-8385 — anytime
- **Availability:** 6/1/2026
- **Flag:** Marked "New" on the listing
- **Notes:** Lowest rent of the saved set. Tradeoff: 4 people share 1 bathroom. Bushwick (not Bed-Stuy despite zip).

listings.title: Sunny Large Bedroom in furnished 4b2ba near J line, Bushwick Duplex
listings.body_md:
## Sunny Large Bedroom — 989 Halsey St Apt 2

- **Rent:** $1,190–$1,250 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 4-bed / 2-bath duplex, furnished
- **Address:** 989 Halsey Street Apt 2, Brooklyn, NY 11207 (Bushwick)
- **Coords:** 40.6818, -73.9090
- **Distance to NYU:** 5.6 miles
- **Lease:** 11-month — **proper long-term lease, not a sublet**
- **Contact:** Phone not shown on listing — must use Send Message form
- **Notes:** Near J subway line (commute to Manhattan). Photos show partial move-out (covered furniture, packed boxes) — verify state at viewing. Listing slightly stale (2 wks).

listings.title: Furnished room/NOT APARTMENT (1417 Bedford Ave)
listings.body_md:
## Furnished room/NOT APARTMENT — 1417 Bedford Ave

- **Rent:** $1,320 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 5-bed / 2-bath, furnished
- **Address:** 1417 Bedford Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11216
- **Coords:** 40.6735, -73.9543
- **Distance to NYU:** 5.3 miles
- **Contact:** (908) 460-7613
- **Availability:** 6/1/2026
- **Notes:** Title emphasizes "NOT APARTMENT" — listing is for a single room in a shared 5-bed unit. Exposed brick, hardwood floors. Listing slightly stale (2 wks).

listings.title: Room in Shared 4 bed/1 bath home (89 Kingston Ave)
listings.operator: June Homes (Private room in a shared home)
listings.body_md:
## Room in Shared 4 bed/1 bath home — 89 Kingston Ave

- **Address:** 89 Kingston Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11213
- **Coords:** 40.6736, -73.9395
- **Unit:** 4-bed / 1-bath shared home
- **Distance to NYU:** 6.1 miles (one room logged at 6.2 mi)
- **Operator:** June Homes — Private room in a shared home
- **Availability:** Available Now

### Rooms / Contacts (3 rooms posted)

| Room | Price/mo | Phone | Hours | Avail | Notes |
|------|----------|-------|-------|-------|-------|
| Room A | $1,200 | (929) 828-4568 | Anytime | Available Now | Primary listing |
| Room B | $1,200 | (718) 550-9202 | — | 2026-06-01 | 12 photos + virtual tour |
| Room C | $1,225 | (929) 225-8453 | Anytime | Available Now | 13 photos + virtual tour |

### Notes
- Cheapest cluster of the batch.
- 1 bath shared by 4 — flag as constraint.
- Multiple phone numbers for the same address suggests separate point-of-contact per room.

listings.title: Exquisite ROOM at The Brower House
listings.body_md:
## Exquisite ROOM at The Brower House

- **Rent:** $1,500 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 6-bed / 4-bath
- **Address:** 913 St Marks Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11213
- **Coords:** 40.6724, -73.9374
- **Distance to NYU:** 5.9 miles
- **Contact:** (929) 356-7956
- **Operator:** June Homes — flexible leases
- **Availability:** Available Now
- **Notes:** Most expensive of the batch but best bath ratio (6 beds / 4 baths ≈ 1.5 beds/bath). Looks newest/most renovated.

listings.title: Nice room in a good neighborhood Apartment
listings.body_md:
## Nice room in a good neighborhood Apartment — 61 Delmonico Pl

- **Rent:** $1,240 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 3-bed / 1-bath apartment
- **Address:** 61 Delmonico Pl, Brooklyn, NY 11206 (East Williamsburg / Bushwick border)
- **Coords:** 40.7037, -73.9434
- **Distance to NYU:** **3.4 miles** — second-closest in batch
- **Contact:** (908) 460-1521
- **Availability:** 6/1/2026
- **Notes:** 908-area-code operator (same cluster as Bedford / Bleecker / Franklin / Myrtle / Madison). Only 3 photos — listing is thin. Modern renovation visible in kitchen photo (mini-split AC, hardwood/LVP floor). Strong NYU proximity at $1,240 makes this competitive with Fort Greene.

listings.title: Room in Shared 4 bed/1 bath home (327 E 22nd St)
listings.operator: June Homes (Private room in a shared home)
listings.body_md:
## Room in Shared 4 bed/1 bath home — 327 E 22nd St

- **Rent:** $1,150 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 4-bed / 1-bath, 127 sqft room
- **Address:** 327 E 22nd St, Brooklyn, NY 11226 (Flatbush / Ditmas Park)
- **Coords:** 40.6390, -73.9591
- **Distance to NYU:** 8.6 miles — far
- **Contact:** (929) 552-2147 anytime
- **Operator:** June Homes
- **Availability:** 6/30/2026
- **Notes:** 4 people / 1 bath is a constraint. Most photos (17) of any saved listing — well-documented. Distance is the main red flag; verify Q-train commute time to Union Square / NYU.

listings.title: Cozy Private ROOM in Fort Greene Apartment
listings.body_md:
## Cozy Private ROOM in Fort Greene Apartment

- **Rent:** $1,490 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 3-bed apartment, private room
- **Address:** 54 Cumberland St, Brooklyn, NY 11205
- **Coords:** 40.6914, -73.9747
- **Distance to NYU:** 2.6 miles (closest of the batch)
- **Contact:** (929) 219-0208
- **Operator:** June Homes — flexible leases
- **Notes:** Nearest to NYU among saved listings. Listed move-in 2026-08-20. Hardwood floors, modern kitchen with stainless appliances.

listings.title: Modern ROOM at The Kensington House
listings.body_md:
## Modern ROOM at The Kensington House

- **Rent:** $1,250 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 3-bed / 1-bath
- **Address:** 723 E 5th St, Brooklyn, NY 11218 (Kensington)
- **Coords:** 40.6402, -73.9743
- **Distance to NYU:** 8.0 miles — far
- **Contact:** (929) 801-3523
- **Operator:** June Homes — flexible leases
- **Availability:** Available Now
- **Notes:** Renovated kitchen w/ in-unit washer; bright finishes (yellow couch, hardwood). 1 bath / 3 beds is a constraint. Kensington is on the F train — verify F-train commute time to West 4th St / NYU.

listings.title: Furnished room/NOT APARTMENT (591 Franklin Ave)
listings.body_md:
## Furnished room/NOT APARTMENT — 591 Franklin Ave

- **Rent:** $1,190 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 4-bed, furnished room
- **Address:** 591 Franklin Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11238
- **Coords:** 40.6800, -73.9569
- **Distance to NYU:** 4.3 miles (tied for closest after Fort Greene)

listings.title: Central AC, washer/dryer, Exposed Brick Room #214 Apartment
listings.body_md:
## Central AC, washer/dryer, Exposed Brick Room #214 Apartment

- **Rent:** $1,240 / bedroom
- **Unit:** 4-bed / 2-bath, Apt #214
- **Address:** 56-48 Myrtle Ave, Queens, NY 11385 (Ridgewood)
- **Coords:** 40.7003, -73.9051
- **Distance to NYU:** 8.0 miles — **farthest in batch**
- **Contact:** (908) 402-1295
- **Availability:** 6/1/2026
- **Amenities called out:** Central AC, in-unit washer/dryer, exposed brick
- **Notes:** Only Queens listing. Distance is the major drawback — verify subway commute time before prioritizing. Listing 2 wks stale.

listings.title: 2 Bed, 1 Bath Apartment 1st Floor (Sublet)
listings.body_md:
## 2 Bed, 1 Bath Apartment 1st Floor — Sublet

- **Rent:** $900 / bedroom — **cheapest in batch**
- **Unit:** 2-bed / 1-bath, 1st floor — sublet of 1 bedroom
- **Address:** 346 50th Street, Brooklyn, NY 11220 (Sunset Park)
- **Coords:** 40.6488, -74.0094
- **Distance to NYU:** 8.5 miles — far
- **Contact:** (646) 489-8926 anytime
- **Lease:** 3-month sublet, **5/15/26 → 7/31/26**
- **Notes:** Short summer-only sublet, not a long-term lease. Photos look dim (purple lighting). Sunset Park is geographically distant but on the R/D lines. Useful only as summer bridge housing.
